shots.title: Move config.ts and loader.ts from CLI to core
shots.notes: Clean copy; CLI re-exports preserve API. Added @types/node to core.

shots.title: Build function registry and search() tool
shots.notes: 33-entry SLOPE_REGISTRY + SLOPE_TYPES constant; search tool with query/module filtering

shots.title: Build execute() tool and node:vm sandbox

hazards.description: mcp-tools resolved published core v0.3.3 instead of workspace — switched to workspace:* protocol

shots.notes: node:vm sandbox with full core API, path-scoped fs, 30s timeout, console capture

shots.title: Remove old tools, tests, docs, bump versions
shots.notes: Server now exposes exactly 2 tools; 16 new tests all pass; README rewritten for code-mode pattern

yardage_book_updates: mcp-tools must use workspace:* for @srbryers/core dep to resolve local changes
core needs @types/node when importing node:fs / node:path modules
node:vm createContext + runInContext pattern for sandboxed code execution
course_management_notes: Code-mode MCP pattern: 2 tools (search + execute) replace N individual tools
Path-scope all fs helpers with safePath() — resolve then check startsWith(cwd)
